title: Dr. Stone: Kingdom of Science
description: Adds Dr. Stone Items and Technology Into Minecraft!
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/020a2f9f67593208fdd81b0fea051b4ba976f841.png)

# **Required Dependencies**
Geckolib
Kleider's Custom Renderer

# **Shiryu Studio's Discord**
For Mod Updates, and Future Projects, [join here!](https://discord.gg/TJj3Sk52Jq)

# **Current Content**
This mod currently adds a handful of content and technology from Dr. Stone, such as the Mass Petrification Event, turning all players and villagers into stone.

One lucky player will find their way under a Miracle Cave, reviving from their stone, and tasked with saving the rest of the world! Adds a fully fleshed out process to creating the Miracle Fluid, allowing you to revive anybody from the stone, and tons of achievements!

Includes items such as Stomping Pots for crushing berries into juice, as well as wine aging in clay pots, and even a distilling and mixing process!

Plans to add much further content and technologies from Dr. Stone in the future, filling your world with life and the wonders of science!

Discover fully in-depth information by visiting the [the Trello!](https://trello.com/b/JxrFaimV/dr-stone-kingdom-of-science)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[ I am not associated with Riichiro Inagaki, or the Dr. Stone Franchise in any way ]
